overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring the Sanctuary of Olympia during golden hour. The character walks along stone terraces lined with classical statues, through covered pergolas with pools, and into a grand temple colonnade with ancient Greek architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone terrace with classical statues and flower beds

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated stone terrace past classical marble statues and purple flower beds

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the terrace wall observing the statues

entered.detail: tall stone retaining wall with cypress trees growing along the top
row of white marble classical Greek statues positioned along the terrace steps
tall narrow evergreen trees growing in a line along the wall
flower beds with purple blooms at the base of the statues
mature olive tree with gnarled trunk and spreading canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit stone terrace lined with classical Greek statues and purple flowers. The camera follows the character walking along a paved path beside a tall stone wall, with an olive tree visible to the left and distant mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pergola walkway with reflecting pool

events.description: entering covered pergola with wooden beam ceiling covered in vines

agents.ego_description: walking under the wooden pergola alongside a rectangular reflecting pool

notable_agents.action: person in robes walking along the opposite side of the pool

entered.detail: wooden beam structure overhead covered with climbing vines creating dappled shade
rectangular water feature with calm reflecting water and floating petals
stone seating along the left side of the walkway
decorative wooden lattice fencing along the left side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded pergola walkway with a wooden beam ceiling covered in vines. A rectangular reflecting pool runs along the right side while stone benches line the left. The lighting shifts to dappled shade as the character walks through this sheltered garden space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple approach with braziers and monumental statues

events.description: exiting covered pergola into open area approaching the temple entrance
walking directly toward bright setting sun creating strong backlight and lens flare

agents.ego_description: approaching the grand temple entrance with large stone columns and burning braziers

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking toward the temple entrance ahead of the player

entered.detail: grand temple entrance with tall stone columns and triangular pediment
large bronze braziers with burning flames along the terrace steps
bronze statue of a figure on a pedestal surrounded by flowers

segments.scene_description: Exiting the pergola, the scene opens into a wide sunlit approach to the temple. The camera faces the bright golden hour sun, creating strong backlighting. The character walks toward the grand temple entrance flanked by burning braziers and monumental statues, with other visitors walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple colonnade with columns and red carpets

events.description: entering the temple colonnade with tall stone columns and red painted ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand colonnade of the temple past large decorative urns and other visitors

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking ahead deeper into the temple

entered.detail: tall fluted stone columns supporting the temple roof
red painted coffered ceiling with decorative patterns
red carpets laid on the stone floor of the colonnade
large decorative ceramic urns positioned between the columns

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple's colonnade, a covered walkway with massive stone columns and a red painted ceiling. Red carpets line the floor between large decorative urns. The lighting becomes mixed as sunlight filters through the columns, and several other visitors are seen walking or standing within the sacred space.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple exit with stone stairs and courtyard

events.description: exiting the temple colonnade into open courtyard with stone staircase

agents.ego_description: exiting the temple and approaching a stone staircase leading to upper terrace levels

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading upward to higher terrace
additional ancient temple structures visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character exits the colonnade into a bright open courtyard. A wide stone staircase leads upward to higher levels of the sanctuary, with additional temple buildings visible in the distance. The scene returns to full sunlight and open sky as the character approaches the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit garden terrace through a shaded sanctuary and into the grand architecture of a Greek temple. It begins on a paved path lined with classical statues and purple flowers, moving past an olive tree toward distant mountains. As the character enters a pergola, the lighting shifts to dappled shade beneath a vine-covered wooden ceiling and a reflecting pool, before the scene opens again into a bright, backlit approach toward a temple entrance flanked by burning braziers. The camera then follows the character into a colonnade with massive stone columns, red carpets, and a painted ceiling where sunlight filters through the pillars. Finally, the movement leads out of the sheltered walkway and back into the full glare of the golden hour sun, facing a wide stone staircase that ascends toward the higher levels of the sanctuary.
